label_1: Pixel reaches native class (3,4,11,12) in <=10 years after T
label_0: Pixel does not reach native class in 10 years
no_transition_classes: Unlike P_to_S, no transition classes accepted (21/41 not intermediate for regeneration)
T_definition: Same as P_to_S: first year with class 15 after native vegetation
ecological_basis: Threshold of 10 years reflects MapBiomas detection capacity for native vegetation regeneration. Incipient regeneration detectable in 5-10 years; physiognomic establishment requires 10-20 years.
future_use: Training parallel Weibull survival model for P_to_N. Then: competing risks model (joint P_to_S and P_to_N).
